description: 4. Get threats from the iDefense database
name: idefense-general

outputs.description: The name of the bad IP Address. IP.Malicious.Vendor For malicious IPs, the vendor that made the decision.
outputs.name: IP.Address

outputs.description: For malicious IPs, the reason that the vendor made the decision. Domain.Name The name of the bad domain.
outputs.name: IP.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: For malicious domains, the vendor that made the decision. Domain.Malicious.Description For malicious domains, the reason that the vendor made the decision.
outputs.name: Domain.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: The bad URL found. URL.Malicious.Vendor For malicious URLs, the vendor that made the decision.
outputs.name: URL.Data

outputs.description: For malicious URLs, the reason that the vendor made the decision. DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested.
outputs.name: URL.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: The type of indicator. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type
